title: Mount Klabat
summary: Mount Klabat is the highest volcano on Sulawesi island, located in the east of Manado city, North Sulawesi, Indonesia. A 170 × 250 m wide, shallow crater lake is found at the summit. There are no confirmed historical eruptions of the volcano. A report of an eruption of Mount Klabat taking place in 1683 is actually thought to be an eruption of Mount Tongkoko volcano instead.
